message.aigf.not_owner: This companion belongs to another player.
message.aigf.gift_accepted: The companion happily accepts your gift.
message.aigf.recalled: AIGF Companion returned to your side.
screen.aigf.title: AIGF Companion
screen.aigf.chat_hint: Talk to your companion. Replies are generated on the client and mirrored back to the world state.
screen.aigf.chat_prefix_hint: Minecraft chat mode: type @aigf <message> in the normal chat.
screen.aigf.care_hint: Mood, energy, and trust shape how your companion behaves.
screen.aigf.words_affect_mood: Your words can hurt, cheer up, or build trust.
screen.aigf.appearance_hint: Use local 64x64 PNG skins or import by nickname.
screen.aigf.prompt_locked: The girl's core prompt is fixed in code and cannot be edited from UI.
